THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAUGHERTY CAROL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRICE BILL DBA SUPERIOR FARMS $2,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,115.00, PLAINTIFF IS 40% COMAPARATIVELY NEGLIGENT. $3500 (COST OF REPAIR) MINUS 40% = $2100.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
